name: Написать отчёт за март по биткоину
description: Написать отчёт за март по биткоину
llm_raw_response: [{"title":"Collect price data","description":"Gather daily Bitcoin price, volume, and market cap data for the entire month of March from reliable financial sources."},{"title":"Analyze price movements","description":"Calculate key metrics such as average price, highs/lows, and volatility to identify overall market trends during March."},{"title":"Summarize market news","description":"Compile a list of significant news events, regulatory updates, and macroeconomic factors that impacted Bitcoin in March."},{"title":"Perform technical analysis","description":"Generate charts and apply indicators (e.g., moving averages, RSI) to assess Bitcoin’s technical behavior throughout the month."},{"title":"Draft report sections","description":"Write distinct sections covering Introduction, Market Overview, Technical Analysis, News Impact, and Conclusion, ensuring each is concise and data‑driven."},{"title":"Review and edit","description":"Proofread the report for factual accuracy, coherence, and adherence to any required formatting guidelines."},{"title":"Add visuals","description":"Insert relevant charts, tables, and screenshots to illustrate price trends, technical indicators, and news highlights."},{"title":"Submit final report","description":"Export the completed document to the desired format (PDF/Word) and deliver it to the intended audience or stakeholder."}]
